            <summary>The easing function (input 0..1, output 0..1). Can be changed at any time.</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="P:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Animations.Animation.DurationSeconds">
            <summary>The animation duration in seconds. Can be changed at any time.</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="P:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Animations.Animation.StartValue">
            <summary>The start value of the animation range. Can be changed at any time.</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="P:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Animations.Animation.EndValue">
            <summary>The end value of the animation range. Can be changed at any time.</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="P:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Animations.Animation.RepeatMode">
            <summary>The repeat mode (Once, Loop, PingPong). Can be changed at any time.</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="P:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Animations.Animation.Value">
            <summary>The current animation value (updated by <see cref="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Animations.Animation.Eval(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext)"/>).</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="P:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Animations.Animation.ValueInt">
            <summary>The current animation value as integer.</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="P:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Animations.Animation.IsRunning">
            <summary>Whether the animation is currently running.</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="P:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Animations.Animation.IsAtEnd">
            <summary>Whether the animation has completed (only meaningful for <see cref="F:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Repeat.Once"/>).</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Animations.Animation.Pause">
            <summary>Pause the animation. Time stops accumulating.</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Animations.Animation.Resume">
            <summary>Resume the animation from where it was paused.</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Animations.Animation.Restart">
            <summary>Restart the animation from the beginning.</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Animations.Animation.Eval(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext)">
            <summary>
            Evaluates the animation for the current frame.
            The result is cached per CycleNo — multiple calls in the same frame return the cached value.
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="T:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Animations.ToggleAnimation`1">
            <summary>
            Cycles through a list of values at a fixed interval.
            Create instances using <see cref="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Animate.ToggleValues``1(System.Double,``0[])"/>.
            Call <see cref="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Animations.ToggleAnimation`1.Eval(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext)"/> once per frame (result is cached per CycleNo).
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="P:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Animations.ToggleAnimation`1.Value">
            <summary>The current value.</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="P:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Animations.ToggleAnimation`1.CurrentIndex">
            <summary>The current index in the values array.</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="P:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Animations.ToggleAnimation`1.IsRunning">
            <summary>Whether the toggle animation is currently running.</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Animations.ToggleAnimation`1.Pause">
            <summary>Pause the toggle animation.</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Animations.ToggleAnimation`1.Resume">
            <summary>Resume the toggle animation.</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Animations.ToggleAnimation`1.Restart">
            <summary>Restart from the first value.</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Animations.ToggleAnimation`1.Eval(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext)">
            <summary>
            Evaluates the toggle animation for the current frame.
            The result is cached per CycleNo — multiple calls in the same frame return the cached value.
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.ArcExtensions.DrawArc(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Paint,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Paint,System.Double,System.Boolean)">
            <summary>
            Draws an arc (pie slice) within the specified bounding rectangle.
            </summary>
            <param name="ctx">The drawing context.</param>
            <param name="x">The x-coordinate of the bounding rectangle's top-left corner.</param>
            <param name="y">The y-coordinate of the bounding rectangle's top-left corner.</param>
            <param name="width">The width of the bounding rectangle.</param>
            <param name="height">The height of the bounding rectangle.</param>
            <param name="startAngle">The starting angle in degrees (0 = right, 90 = down).</param>
            <param name="sweepAngle">The sweep angle in degrees (positive = clockwise).</param>
            <param name="colorFill">The fill paint (solid color, gradient, etc.). If null, no fill is drawn.</param>
            <param name="colorStroke">The stroke paint (solid color, gradient, etc.). If null, no stroke is drawn.</param>
            <param name="strokeWidth">The width of the stroke.</param>
            <param name="isAntialias">Whether to use anti-aliasing.</param>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.ArcExtensions.DrawArcCenter(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Paint,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Paint,System.Double,System.Boolean)">
            <summary>
            Draws an arc (pie slice) centered at the specified point.
            </summary>
            <param name="ctx">The drawing context.</param>
            <param name="centerX">The x-coordinate of the arc's center.</param>
            <param name="centerY">The y-coordinate of the arc's center.</param>
            <param name="radius">The radius of the arc.</param>
            <param name="startAngle">The starting angle in degrees (0 = right, 90 = down).</param>
            <param name="sweepAngle">The sweep angle in degrees (positive = clockwise).</param>
            <param name="colorFill">The fill paint (solid color, gradient, etc.). If null, no fill is drawn.</param>
            <param name="colorStroke">The stroke paint (solid color, gradient, etc.). If null, no stroke is drawn.</param>
            <param name="strokeWidth">The width of the stroke.</param>
            <param name="isAntialias">Whether to use anti-aliasing.</param>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.BackgroundExtensions.DrawBackground(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Paint,System.Boolean)">
            <summary>
            Fills the entire canvas with the specified paint.
            </summary>
            <param name="ctx">The drawing context.</param>
            <param name="color">The fill paint (solid color, gradient, etc.).</param>
            <param name="isAntialias">Whether to use anti-aliasing.</param>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.CircleExtensions.DrawCircle(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Paint,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Paint,System.Double,System.Boolean)">
            <summary>
            Draws a circle at the specified center point.
            </summary>
            <param name="ctx">The drawing context.</param>
            <param name="centerX">The x-coordinate of the circle's center.</param>
            <param name="centerY">The y-coordinate of the circle's center.</param>
            <param name="radius">The radius of the circle.</param>
            <param name="colorFill">The fill paint (solid color, gradient, etc.). If null and colorStroke is also null, defaults to Lime.</param>
            <param name="colorStroke">The stroke paint (solid color, gradient, etc.). If null, no stroke is drawn.</param>
            <param name="strokeWidth">The width of the stroke.</param>
            <param name="isAntialias">Whether to use anti-aliasing.</param>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.EllipseExtensions.DrawEllipse(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Paint,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Paint,System.Double,System.Boolean)">
            <summary>
            Draws an ellipse centred at (centerX, centerY) with horizontal radius
            <paramref name="radiusX"/> and vertical radius <paramref name="radiusY"/>.
            For a circle, use <see cref="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.CircleExtensions.DrawCircle(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Paint,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Paint,System.Double,System.Boolean)"/> instead.
            </summary>
            <param name="ctx">The drawing context.</param>
            <param name="centerX">X of the centre.</param>
            <param name="centerY">Y of the centre.</param>
            <param name="radiusX">Horizontal radius (half-width).</param>
            <param name="radiusY">Vertical radius (half-height).</param>
            <param name="colorFill">Fill paint. If null and colorStroke is also null, defaults to Lime.</param>
            <param name="colorStroke">Stroke paint. If null, no outline is drawn.</param>
            <param name="strokeWidth">Stroke width.</param>
            <param name="isAntialias">Whether to use anti-aliasing.</param>
        </member>
        <member name="T:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Image">
            <summary>
            Factory for loading images.
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Image.LoadSingleImage(System.IO.Stream)">
            <summary>Loads a single image from a stream. For animated formats, only the first frame is used.</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Image.LoadSingleImage(System.Byte[])">
            <summary>Loads a single image from a byte array.</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Image.LoadSingleImage(System.String,System.String)">
            <summary>Loads a single image from a file path. Relative paths are resolved relative to the calling source file.</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Image.LoadAnimatedGif(System.IO.Stream)">
            <summary>
            Loads an animated image from a stream.
            Works with both animated GIFs (multiple frames) and static images (single frame).
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Image.LoadAnimatedGif(System.Byte[])">
            <summary>Loads an animated image from a byte array.</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Image.LoadAnimatedGif(System.String,System.String)">
            <summary>Loads an animated image from a file path. Relative paths are resolved relative to the calling source file.</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="T:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.SingleImage">
            <summary>
            Represents a single static image (PNG, JPEG, or single frame from any image format).
            All transformation methods return new instances (immutable).
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="P:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.SingleImage.Width">
            <summary>The width of the image in pixels.</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="P:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.SingleImage.Height">
            <summary>The height of the image in pixels.</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.SingleImage.Resize(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean)">
            <summary>Returns a resized copy of this image.</summary>
            <param name="width">Target width in pixels.</param>
            <param name="height">Target height in pixels.</param>
            <param name="useAntiAlias">If true, uses high-quality filtering. If false, uses nearest-neighbor.</param>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.SingleImage.Crop(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)">
            <summary>
            Returns a cropped copy by removing pixels from each edge.
            </summary>
            <param name="left">Pixels to remove from the left edge.</param>
            <param name="top">Pixels to remove from the top edge.</param>
            <param name="right">Pixels to remove from the right edge.</param>
            <param name="bottom">Pixels to remove from the bottom edge.</param>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.SingleImage.CropRegion(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)">
            <summary>
            Returns a cropped copy by specifying a region (position and size).
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.SingleImage.ToSpriteMap(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Double,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)">
            <summary>
            Splits this image into a grid of cells to create a sprite map.
            </summary>
            <param name="cellWidth">Width of each sprite cell in pixels.</param>
            <param name="cellHeight">Height of each sprite cell in pixels.</param>
            <param name="frameDurationMs">Default frame duration in milliseconds when used in animations.</param>
            <param name="marginLeft">Left margin to skip within each cell.</param>
            <param name="marginTop">Top margin to skip within each cell.</param>
            <param name="marginRight">Right margin to skip within each cell.</param>
            <param name="marginBottom">Bottom margin to skip within each cell.</param>
        </member>
        <member name="T:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.AnimatedGifFrame">
            <summary>
            Represents a single frame within an animated image.
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="P:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.AnimatedGifFrame.Duration">
            <summary>The display duration of this frame.</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="P:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.AnimatedGifFrame.Width">
            <summary>The width of this frame in pixels.</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="P:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.AnimatedGifFrame.Height">
            <summary>The height of this frame in pixels.</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="T:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.AnimatedGif">
            <summary>
            Represents an animated image (animated GIF or any multi-frame image).
            Also works with single-frame images (e.g. a static PNG loaded as AnimatedGif).
            All transformation methods return new instances (immutable).
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="P:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.AnimatedGif.Frames">
            <summary>The frames of this animation.</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="P:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.AnimatedGif.FrameCount">
            <summary>The number of frames.</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="P:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.AnimatedGif.Width">
            <summary>The width of the animation (from the first frame).</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="P:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.AnimatedGif.Height">
            <summary>The height of the animation (from the first frame).</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="P:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.AnimatedGif.TotalDuration">
            <summary>The total duration of all frames combined.</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.AnimatedGif.Resize(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean)">
            <summary>Returns a resized copy of this animation (all frames).</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.AnimatedGif.Crop(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)">
            <summary>
            Returns a cropped copy of this animation by removing pixels from each edge.
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.AnimatedGif.CropRegion(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)">
            <summary>
            Returns a cropped copy of this animation by specifying a region.
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.AnimatedGif.WithFrameDuration(System.Double)">
            <summary>
            Returns a copy of this animation with all frame durations set to the specified value.
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="T:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.SpriteMap">
            <summary>
            A grid of sprite cells extracted from a sprite sheet image.
            Use <see cref="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.SingleImage.ToSpriteMap(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Double,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)"/> to create a SpriteMap.
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="P:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.SpriteMap.Rows">
            <summary>The number of rows in the sprite grid.</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="P:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.SpriteMap.Columns">
            <summary>The number of columns in the sprite grid.</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="P:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.SpriteMap.CellWidth">
            <summary>The width of each cell in pixels.</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="P:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.SpriteMap.CellHeight">
            <summary>The height of each cell in pixels.</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="P:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.SpriteMap.Item(System.Int32,System.Int32)">
            <summary>Gets the sprite cell at the specified row and column as a SingleImage.</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.SpriteMap.CreateAnimation(System.ValueTuple{System.Int32,System.Int32}[])">
            <summary>
            Creates an animation from a sequence of sprite cells.
            Each frame uses the duration specified when the sprite map was created.
            </summary>
            <param name="cells">The (Row, Col) coordinates of the cells to include, in order.</param>
        </member>
        <member name="T:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.ImageExtensions">
            <summary>
            Extension methods for drawing images on a <see cref="T:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext"/>.
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.ImageExtensions.DrawImage(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.SingleImage,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.BlendMode)">
            <summary>Draws a static image at the specified position.</summary>
            <param name="ctx">The drawing context.</param>
            <param name="image">The image to draw.</param>
            <param name="x">The x-coordinate of the top-left corner.</param>
            <param name="y">The y-coordinate of the top-left corner.</param>
            <param name="opacity">Image opacity (0..1). 1 = fully opaque (default).</param>
            <param name="blendMode">How the image blends with what's already drawn. Default = SourceOver.</param>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.ImageExtensions.DrawImage(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.AnimatedGif,System.Double,System.Double,System.Boolean,System.Double,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.BlendMode)">
            <summary>
            Draws an animated image at the specified position.
            The displayed frame is selected based on the elapsed time of the scene.
            </summary>
            <param name="ctx">The drawing context.</param>
            <param name="gif">The animated image to draw.</param>
            <param name="x">The x-coordinate of the top-left corner.</param>
            <param name="y">The y-coordinate of the top-left corner.</param>
            <param name="repeat">If true, the animation loops. If false, it stops on the last frame.</param>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.ImageExtensions.DrawImage(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.SingleImage,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Interpolation,System.Double,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.BlendMode)">
            <summary>
            Draws a static image scaled to fit the destination rectangle.
            </summary>
            <param name="ctx">The drawing context.</param>
            <param name="image">The image to draw.</param>
            <param name="x">Destination top-left x.</param>
            <param name="y">Destination top-left y.</param>
            <param name="width">Destination width.</param>
            <param name="height">Destination height.</param>
            <param name="interpolation">Sampling mode. Default = NearestNeighbor (crisp pixels).</param>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.ImageExtensions.DrawImageRegion(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.SingleImage,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Interpolation,System.Double,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.BlendMode)">
            <summary>
            Draws a region of a static image to a destination rectangle.
            </summary>
            <param name="ctx">The drawing context.</param>
            <param name="image">The image to draw.</param>
            <param name="srcX">Source rectangle x in image pixels.</param>
            <param name="srcY">Source rectangle y in image pixels.</param>
            <param name="srcWidth">Source width in image pixels.</param>
            <param name="srcHeight">Source height in image pixels.</param>
            <param name="dstX">Destination top-left x.</param>
            <param name="dstY">Destination top-left y.</param>
            <param name="dstWidth">Destination width.</param>
            <param name="dstHeight">Destination height.</param>
            <param name="interpolation">Sampling mode. Default = NearestNeighbor (crisp pixels).</param>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.ImageExtensions.DrawImageRotated(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.SingleImage,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Interpolation,System.Double,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.BlendMode)">
            <summary>
            Draws a static image rotated around a pivot point.
            </summary>
            <param name="ctx">The drawing context.</param>
            <param name="image">The image to draw.</param>
            <param name="x">Destination top-left x BEFORE rotation.</param>
            <param name="y">Destination top-left y BEFORE rotation.</param>
            <param name="rotationDegrees">Rotation angle in degrees, around the pivot.</param>
            <param name="pivotX">Pivot x in canvas coordinates.</param>
            <param name="pivotY">Pivot y in canvas coordinates.</param>
            <param name="interpolation">Sampling mode. Default = NearestNeighbor (crisp pixels).</param>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.LineExtensions.DrawLine(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Paint,System.Double,System.Boolean)">
            <summary>
            Draws a line between two points.
            </summary>
            <param name="ctx">The drawing context.</param>
            <param name="x1">The x-coordinate of the start point.</param>
            <param name="y1">The y-coordinate of the start point.</param>
            <param name="x2">The x-coordinate of the end point.</param>
            <param name="y2">The y-coordinate of the end point.</param>
            <param name="color">The stroke paint (solid color, gradient, etc.). Defaults to Lime if null.</param>
            <param name="strokeWidth">The width of the line.</param>
            <param name="isAntialias">Whether to use anti-aliasing.</param>
        </member>
        <member name="T:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext">
            <summary>
            This class is intended to be "using static"-ed to provide easy access to the current RenderCtx
            and to other basic idiomatic PXL functions.
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext.IsInBounds(System.Int32,System.Int32)">
            <summary>True if (x, y) is a valid pixel coordinate on this canvas.</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext.SetPixelSafe(System.Int32,System.Int32,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color)">
            <summary>
            Sets a pixel only if (x, y) is in bounds — silently ignores
            out-of-canvas writes. Use in the inner loop of any per-pixel
            pass that might generate coordinates near the canvas edges.
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext.TrySetPixel(System.Int32,System.Int32,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color)">
            <summary>
            Tries to set a pixel. Returns false if (x, y) is out of bounds.
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext.GetPixelOrDefault(System.Int32,System.Int32,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color)">
            <summary>
            Returns the pixel at (x, y) if it's in bounds, otherwise the given fallback.
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext.TryGetPixel(System.Int32,System.Int32,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color@)">
            <summary>
            Tries to read a pixel. Returns false if (x, y) is out of bounds.
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext.#ctor(Pxl.RenderCtx)">
            <summary>
            This class is intended to be "using static"-ed to provide easy access to the current RenderCtx
            and to other basic idiomatic PXL functions.
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.ForkedDrawingContext.Scale(System.Double)">
            <summary>Scales the layer uniformly.</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.ForkedDrawingContext.Scale(System.Double,System.Double)">
            <summary>Scales the layer by the given factors.</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.ForkedDrawingContext.Translate(System.Double,System.Double)">
            <summary>Translates the layer by the given offset.</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.ForkedDrawingContext.Rotate(System.Double)">
            <summary>Rotates the layer around its center (in degrees).</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.ForkedDrawingContext.Rotate(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)">
            <summary>Rotates the layer around the given point (in degrees).</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.ForkedDrawingContext.SetTransform(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Transform2D)">
            <summary>
            Replaces the current accumulated transform with the given <see cref="T:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Transform2D"/>.
            Useful when you have a precomposed transform you want to apply outright.
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.ForkedDrawingContext.ApplyTransform(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Transform2D)">
            <summary>
            Composes the given <see cref="T:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Transform2D"/> on top of the current transform
            (post-concat — same as calling <see cref="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.ForkedDrawingContext.Translate(System.Double,System.Double)"/>/<see cref="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.ForkedDrawingContext.Scale(System.Double)"/>/<see cref="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.ForkedDrawingContext.Rotate(System.Double)"/>).
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.ForkedDrawingContext.Apply(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.BlendMode,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Interpolation)">
            <summary>
            Applies the layer onto the parent context with all accumulated transforms.
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.RenderCtxPixelsExtensions.Fork(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext)">
            <summary>
            Creates a new RenderCtx initialized with a cropped region from the parent context.
            If x, y, width, or height is null, defaults are used (0, 0, ctx.Width, ctx.Height).
            The forked context has to be applied back to the parent context manually using Apply().
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.RenderCtxPixelsExtensions.NewLayer(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,System.Nullable{Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color})">
            <summary>
            Creates a new black RenderCtx.
            If width or height is null, the current context's dimension is used.
            The forked context has to be applied back to the parent context manually using Apply().
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.RenderCtxPixelsExtensions.SetPixels(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color[],Pxl.Ui.CSharp.BlendMode)">
            <summary>
            Draws the given pixel array onto the canvas.
            The array length must match Width * Height of the context.
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.PointExtensions.DrawPoint(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,System.Double,System.Double,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Paint,System.Double,System.Boolean)">
            <summary>
            Draws a single point (pixel) at the specified location.
            </summary>
            <param name="ctx">The drawing context.</param>
            <param name="x">The x-coordinate of the point.</param>
            <param name="y">The y-coordinate of the point.</param>
            <param name="color">The paint (solid color, gradient, etc.). Defaults to Lime if null.</param>
            <param name="strokeWidth">The size of the point.</param>
            <param name="isAntialias">Whether to use anti-aliasing.</param>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.PolygonExtensions.DrawPolygon(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,System.ValueTuple{System.Double,System.Double}[],Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Paint,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Paint,System.Double,System.Boolean)">
            <summary>
            Draws a closed polygon defined by a sequence of points.
            </summary>
            <param name="ctx">The drawing context.</param>
            <param name="points">Vertex positions in draw order. The polygon is closed automatically.</param>
            <param name="colorFill">Fill paint. If null and colorStroke is also null, defaults to Lime.</param>
            <param name="colorStroke">Stroke paint. If null, no outline is drawn.</param>
            <param name="strokeWidth">Stroke width.</param>
            <param name="isAntialias">Whether to use anti-aliasing.</param>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.PolygonExtensions.DrawPolyline(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,System.ValueTuple{System.Double,System.Double}[],Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Paint,System.Double,System.Boolean)">
            <summary>
            Draws an open polyline (chain of line segments) — same as
            <see cref="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.PolygonExtensions.DrawPolygon(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,System.ValueTuple{System.Double,System.Double}[],Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Paint,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Paint,System.Double,System.Boolean)"/> but without closing the last segment back
            to the first point. Stroke only, no fill.
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.RectExtensions.DrawRectXyWh(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Paint,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Paint,System.Double,System.Boolean)">
            <summary>
            Draws a rectangle specified by position and size.
            </summary>
            <param name="ctx">The drawing context.</param>
            <param name="x">The x-coordinate of the top-left corner.</param>
            <param name="y">The y-coordinate of the top-left corner.</param>
            <param name="width">The width of the rectangle.</param>
            <param name="height">The height of the rectangle.</param>
            <param name="colorFill">The fill paint (solid color, gradient, etc.). If null, no fill is drawn.</param>
            <param name="colorStroke">The stroke paint (solid color, gradient, etc.). If null, no stroke is drawn.</param>
            <param name="strokeWidth">The width of the stroke.</param>
            <param name="isAntialias">Whether to use anti-aliasing.</param>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.RectExtensions.DrawRectXyXy(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Paint,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Paint,System.Double,System.Boolean)">
            <summary>
            Draws a rectangle specified by two corner points.
            </summary>
            <param name="ctx">The drawing context.</param>
            <param name="x1">The x-coordinate of the first corner.</param>
            <param name="y1">The y-coordinate of the first corner.</param>
            <param name="x2">The x-coordinate of the opposite corner.</param>
            <param name="y2">The y-coordinate of the opposite corner.</param>
            <param name="colorFill">The fill paint (solid color, gradient, etc.). If null, no fill is drawn.</param>
            <param name="colorStroke">The stroke paint (solid color, gradient, etc.). If null, no stroke is drawn.</param>
            <param name="strokeWidth">The width of the stroke.</param>
            <param name="isAntialias">Whether to use anti-aliasing.</param>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.RoundedRectExtensions.DrawRoundedRect(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Paint,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Paint,System.Double,System.Boolean)">
            <summary>
            Draws a rectangle with rounded corners.
            </summary>
            <param name="ctx">The drawing context.</param>
            <param name="x">Top-left x.</param>
            <param name="y">Top-left y.</param>
            <param name="width">Rectangle width.</param>
            <param name="height">Rectangle height.</param>
            <param name="cornerRadius">Corner radius in pixels (uniform for all four corners).</param>
            <param name="colorFill">Fill paint. If null and colorStroke is also null, defaults to Lime.</param>
            <param name="colorStroke">Stroke paint. If null, no outline is drawn.</param>
            <param name="strokeWidth">Stroke width.</param>
            <param name="isAntialias">Whether to use anti-aliasing.</param>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.TextExtensions.DrawText(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,System.String,System.Double,System.Double,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.FontInfo,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Paint,System.Nullable{System.Double},Pxl.Ui.CSharp.TextEdging,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.TextHinting,System.Double,System.Double,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)">
            <summary>
            Draws text at the specified position.
            </summary>
            <param name="ctx">The drawing context.</param>
            <param name="text">The text string to draw.</param>
            <param name="x">The x-coordinate of the text's left edge.</param>
            <param name="y">The y-coordinate of the text's top edge.</param>
            <param name="font">The font to use. Defaults to Var4x5 if null.</param>
            <param name="color">The text paint (solid color, gradient, etc.). Defaults to White if null.</param>
            <param name="fontSize">The font size. Defaults to the font's default height if null.</param>
            <param name="edging">How glyph edges are rendered. Default is <see cref="F:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.TextEdging.Pixel"/> (crisp).</param>
            <param name="hinting">How aggressively glyphs snap to the pixel grid.</param>
            <param name="scaleX">Horizontal scale factor.</param>
            <param name="skewX">Horizontal skew factor for italic effect.</param>
            <param name="embolden">Whether to embolden the text.</param>
            <param name="baselineSnap">Whether to snap glyphs to the baseline.</param>
            <param name="linearMetrics">Whether to use linear metrics.</param>
            <param name="subpixel">Whether to use subpixel positioning.</param>
            <param name="isAntialias">Whether the paint itself is anti-aliased.</param>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.TextExtensions.DrawTextVar3x5(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,System.String,System.Double,System.Double,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Paint,System.Nullable{System.Double},Pxl.Ui.CSharp.TextEdging,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.TextHinting,System.Double,System.Double,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)">

            Draws text using the Var3x5 proportional font (3 pixels wide, 5 pixels tall).

        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.TextExtensions.DrawTextMono3x5(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,System.String,System.Double,System.Double,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Paint,System.Nullable{System.Double},Pxl.Ui.CSharp.TextEdging,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.TextHinting,System.Double,System.Double,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)">

        </member>
        <member name="T:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.TextExtensions.TextAlign">
            <summary>Horizontal alignment of text relative to its anchor x.</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="T:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.TextExtensions.VerticalAlign">
            <summary>Vertical alignment of text relative to its anchor y.</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.TextExtensions.DrawTextAligned(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,System.String,System.Double,System.Double,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.TextExtensions.TextAlign,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.FontInfo,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Paint,System.Nullable{System.Double})">
            <summary>
            Draws text aligned horizontally relative to <paramref name="anchorX"/>.
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.TextExtensions.DrawTextAligned(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,System.String,System.Double,System.Double,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.TextExtensions.TextAlign,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.TextExtensions.VerticalAlign,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.FontInfo,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Paint,System.Nullable{System.Double})">
            <summary>
            Draws text aligned both horizontally AND vertically around an anchor point.
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.TextExtensions.DrawTextCentered(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,System.String,System.Double,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.FontInfo,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Paint,System.Nullable{System.Double})">
            <summary>
            Draws text horizontally centred on the canvas (uses ctx.Width).
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.TextExtensions.DrawTextInRect(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,System.String,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.TextExtensions.TextAlign,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.TextExtensions.VerticalAlign,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.FontInfo,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Paint,System.Nullable{System.Double})">
            <summary>
            Draws text positioned inside a rectangle with horizontal + vertical alignment.
            Output is clipped to the rectangle (text overflowing the rect is cut off).
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.TextExtensions.DrawMarquee(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,System.String,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.FontInfo,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Paint,System.Nullable{System.Double},Pxl.Ui.CSharp.TextExtensions.VerticalAlign)">
            <summary>
            Draws scrolling text inside a rectangle. The text moves horizontally
            from right to left at <paramref name="pixelsPerSecond"/> and wraps,
            with <paramref name="gapPixels"/> empty space between the end of one
            pass and the start of the next. Useful for headlines, news tickers,
            long song titles on the small canvas.
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.TextExtensions.MeasureText(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,System.String,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.FontInfo,System.Nullable{System.Double})">
            <summary>
            Measures the width of the given text string using the specified font.
            </summary>
            <param name="ctx">The drawing context.</param>
            <param name="text">The text string to measure.</param>
            <param name="font">The font to use. Defaults to Var4x5 if null.</param>
            <param name="fontSize">The font size. Defaults to the font's default height if null.</param>
            <returns>The width of the text in pixels.</returns>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.TextExtensions.MeasureTextVar3x5(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Double})">
            <inheritdoc cref="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.TextExtensions.MeasureText(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,System.String,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.FontInfo,System.Nullable{System.Double})"/>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.TextExtensions.MeasureTextMono3x5(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Double})">
            <inheritdoc cref="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.TextExtensions.MeasureText(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,System.String,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.FontInfo,System.Nullable{System.Double})"/>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.TextExtensions.MeasureTextVar4x5(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Double})">
            <inheritdoc cref="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.TextExtensions.MeasureText(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,System.String,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.FontInfo,System.Nullable{System.Double})"/>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.TextExtensions.MeasureTextMono4x5(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Double})">
            <inheritdoc cref="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.TextExtensions.MeasureText(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,System.String,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.FontInfo,System.Nullable{System.Double})"/>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.TextExtensions.MeasureTextMono6x6(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Double})">
            <inheritdoc cref="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.TextExtensions.MeasureText(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,System.String,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.FontInfo,System.Nullable{System.Double})"/>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.TextExtensions.MeasureTextMono7x10(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Double})">
            <inheritdoc cref="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.TextExtensions.MeasureText(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,System.String,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.FontInfo,System.Nullable{System.Double})"/>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.TextExtensions.MeasureTextVar10x10(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Double})">
            <inheritdoc cref="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.TextExtensions.MeasureText(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,System.String,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.FontInfo,System.Nullable{System.Double})"/>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.TextExtensions.MeasureTextMono10x10(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Double})">
            <inheritdoc cref="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.TextExtensions.MeasureText(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,System.String,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.FontInfo,System.Nullable{System.Double})"/>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.TextExtensions.MeasureTextMono16x16(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Double})">
            <inheritdoc cref="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.TextExtensions.MeasureText(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,System.String,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.FontInfo,System.Nullable{System.Double})"/>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.TextExtensions.MeasureTextHeight(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.FontInfo,System.Nullable{System.Double})">
            <summary>
            Returns the rendering height of the given font (uses <see cref="P:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.FontInfo.DefaultHeight"/>
            or the explicitly given <paramref name="fontSize"/>).
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.TriangleExtensions.DrawTriangle(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.DrawingContext,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Paint,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Paint,System.Double,System.Boolean)">
            <summary>
            Draws a triangle defined by three corner points.
            </summary>
            <param name="ctx">The drawing context.</param>
            <param name="x1">X of corner 1.</param><param name="y1">Y of corner 1.</param>
            <param name="x2">X of corner 2.</param><param name="y2">Y of corner 2.</param>
            <param name="x3">X of corner 3.</param><param name="y3">Y of corner 3.</param>
            <param name="colorFill">Fill paint. If null and colorStroke is also null, defaults to Lime.</param>
            <param name="colorStroke">Stroke paint. If null, no outline is drawn.</param>
            <param name="strokeWidth">Stroke width.</param>
            <param name="isAntialias">Whether to use anti-aliasing.</param>
        </member>
        <member name="T:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.BlendMode">
            <summary>
            Blend modes control how colors are combined when drawing on top of existing content.
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="F:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.BlendMode.Clear">
            <summary>
            Clear destination (replace with transparent).
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="F:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.BlendMode.Source">
            <summary>
            Replace destination with source.
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="F:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.BlendMode.Destination">
            <summary>
            Keep destination, ignore source.
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="F:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.BlendMode.SourceOver">
            <summary>
            Source over destination (default alpha blending).
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="F:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.BlendMode.DestinationOver">
            <summary>
            Destination over source.
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="F:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.BlendMode.SourceIn">
            <summary>
            Source inside destination (mask source by destination alpha).
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="F:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.BlendMode.DestinationIn">
            <summary>
            Destination inside source (mask destination by source alpha).
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="F:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.BlendMode.SourceOut">
            <summary>
            Source outside destination (inverse mask).
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="F:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.BlendMode.DestinationOut">
            <summary>
            Destination outside source (inverse mask).
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="F:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.BlendMode.SourceAtop">
            <summary>
            Source atop destination (source where destination is opaque).
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="F:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.BlendMode.DestinationAtop">
            <summary>
            Destination atop source (destination where source is opaque).
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="F:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.BlendMode.Xor">
            <summary>
            Exclusive OR (source XOR destination).
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="F:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.BlendMode.Plus">
            <summary>
            Add source and destination (clamps to 1.0).
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="F:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.BlendMode.Modulate">
            <summary>
            Multiply source and destination (darkens).
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="F:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.BlendMode.Screen">
            <summary>
            Screen blend mode (inverted multiply, lightens).
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="F:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.BlendMode.Overlay">
            <summary>
            Overlay blend mode (combination of multiply and screen).
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="F:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.BlendMode.Darken">
            <summary>
            Darken: keeps the darker of source and destination.
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="F:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.BlendMode.Lighten">
            <summary>
            Lighten: keeps the lighter of source and destination.
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="F:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.BlendMode.ColorDodge">
            <summary>
            Color dodge (brightens destination based on source).
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="F:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.BlendMode.ColorBurn">
            <summary>
            Color burn (darkens destination based on source).
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="F:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.BlendMode.HardLight">
            <summary>
            Hard light (harsh version of overlay).
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="F:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.BlendMode.SoftLight">
            <summary>
            Soft light (gentle version of overlay).
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="F:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.BlendMode.Difference">
            <summary>
            Difference (absolute difference between source and destination).
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="F:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.BlendMode.Exclusion">
            <summary>
            Exclusion (similar to difference but lower contrast).
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="F:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.BlendMode.Multiply">
            <summary>
            Multiply (darkens by multiplying colors).
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="F:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.BlendMode.Hue">
            <summary>
            Hue blend mode (use source hue with destination saturation and luminosity).
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="F:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.BlendMode.Saturation">
            <summary>
            Saturation blend mode (use source saturation with destination hue and luminosity).
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="F:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.BlendMode.Color">
            <summary>
            Color blend mode (use source hue and saturation with destination luminosity).
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="F:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.BlendMode.Luminosity">
            <summary>
            Luminosity blend mode (use source luminosity with destination hue and saturation).
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="T:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.ColorOps">
            <summary>
            Color blending and lighting operations. These complement the constructors
            on <see cref="T:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color"/> with operations BETWEEN colours — interpolation,
            tinting, lighting — that pixogram authors otherwise rewrite by hand.
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.ColorOps.Lerp(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color,System.Double)">
            <summary>
            Componentwise linear interpolation between two colors. <paramref name="t"/>
            is clamped to [0, 1]: 0 returns <paramref name="a"/>, 1 returns <paramref name="b"/>.
            Alpha is also interpolated.
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.ColorOps.LerpTo(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color,System.Double)">
            <summary>Extension form of <see cref="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.ColorOps.Lerp(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color,System.Double)"/>.</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.ColorOps.Tinted(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color,System.Double)">
            <summary>
            Mix this colour TOWARD another by <paramref name="strength"/> (0..1).
            Equivalent to <c>Lerp(this, tint, strength)</c> — useful for "warm tint at horizon"
            or "blend in a touch of ambient" effects.
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.ColorOps.LitBy(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color,System.Double)">
             <summary>
             Multiplicative lighting: simulate the colour being lit by a coloured light
             at a given brightness. Returns componentwise <c>color × light × brightness</c>,
             clamped to [0, 1] per channel. Alpha is preserved.
            
             Example: a brown wood deck under cool blue moonlight at 40% brightness:
             <c>woodColor.LitBy(Color.FromRgb(0.45, 0.55, 0.85), 0.40)</c>.
             </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.ColorOps.Blend(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color[],System.Double[])">
            <summary>
            N-way weighted blend. Returns the linear combination of the given colors
            using the given weights. Weights need not sum to 1 — they're normalised
            internally. If <paramref name="weights"/> is empty or all zero, returns
            the first color.
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="T:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color">
            <summary>
            Represents a color with RGBA components.
            <para>
            The Color struct provides a double-based public API (0.0 to 1.0 range) while internally
            storing the color as a single <c>uint</c> in ARGB format, matching <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKColor"/>'s
            representation for zero-cost conversion.
            </para>
            <para>
            Factory methods and properties with "Byte" suffix work with byte values (0-255),
            while methods without suffix work with double values (0.0-1.0).
            </para>
            </summary>
            <remarks>
            <list type="table">
            <listheader><term>Property</term><description>Description</description></listheader>
            <item><term><see cref="P:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color.R"/>, <see cref="P:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color.G"/>, <see cref="P:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color.B"/>, <see cref="P:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color.A"/></term><description>Color components as double (0.0-1.0)</description></item>
            <item><term><see cref="P:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color.RedByte"/>, <see cref="P:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color.GreenByte"/>, <see cref="P:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color.BlueByte"/>, <see cref="P:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color.AlphaByte"/></term><description>Color components as byte (0-255)</description></item>
            </list>
            </remarks>
        </member>
        <member name="P:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color.R">
            <summary>Gets the red component as a value from 0.0 to 1.0.</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="P:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color.G">
            <summary>Gets the green component as a value from 0.0 to 1.0.</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="P:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color.B">
            <summary>Gets the blue component as a value from 0.0 to 1.0.</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="P:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color.A">
            <summary>Gets the alpha (opacity) component as a value from 0.0 (transparent) to 1.0 (opaque).</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="P:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color.RedByte">
            <summary>Gets the red component as a byte value from 0 to 255.</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="P:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color.GreenByte">
            <summary>Gets the green component as a byte value from 0 to 255.</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="P:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color.BlueByte">
            <summary>Gets the blue component as a byte value from 0 to 255.</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="P:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color.AlphaByte">
            <summary>Gets the alpha (opacity) component as a byte value from 0 (transparent) to 255 (opaque).</summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color.#ctor(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)">
            <summary>
            Creates a color from RGBA double values in the range 0.0 to 1.0.
            </summary>
            <param name="r">Red component (0.0-1.0).</param>
            <param name="g">Green component (0.0-1.0).</param>
            <param name="b">Blue component (0.0-1.0).</param>
            <param name="a">Alpha component (0.0-1.0). Defaults to 1.0 (fully opaque).</param>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color.#ctor(System.Byte,System.Byte,System.Byte,System.Byte)">
            <summary>
            Creates a color from RGBA byte values (0-255).
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color.#ctor(System.UInt32)">
            <summary>
            Creates a color from the raw uint value (same format as SKColor).
            </summary>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color.FromArgb(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)">
            <summary>Creates a color from ARGB double values (0.0-1.0).</summary>
            <param name="alpha">Alpha component (0.0-1.0).</param>
            <param name="red">Red component (0.0-1.0).</param>
            <param name="green">Green component (0.0-1.0).</param>
            <param name="blue">Blue component (0.0-1.0).</param>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color.FromRgba(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)">
            <summary>Creates a color from RGBA double values (0.0-1.0).</summary>
            <param name="red">Red component (0.0-1.0).</param>
            <param name="green">Green component (0.0-1.0).</param>
            <param name="blue">Blue component (0.0-1.0).</param>
            <param name="alpha">Alpha component (0.0-1.0).</param>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color.FromRgb(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)">
            <summary>Creates a color from RGB double values (0.0-1.0) with full opacity.</summary>
            <param name="red">Red component (0.0-1.0).</param>
            <param name="green">Green component (0.0-1.0).</param>
            <param name="blue">Blue component (0.0-1.0).</param>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color.FromArgbByte(System.Byte,System.Byte,System.Byte,System.Byte)">
            <summary>Creates a color from ARGB byte values (0-255).</summary>
            <param name="alpha">Alpha component (0-255).</param>
            <param name="red">Red component (0-255).</param>
            <param name="green">Green component (0-255).</param>
            <param name="blue">Blue component (0-255).</param>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color.FromRgbaByte(System.Byte,System.Byte,System.Byte,System.Byte)">
            <summary>Creates a color from RGBA byte values (0-255).</summary>
            <param name="red">Red component (0-255).</param>
            <param name="green">Green component (0-255).</param>
            <param name="blue">Blue component (0-255).</param>
            <param name="alpha">Alpha component (0-255).</param>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color.FromRgbByte(System.Byte,System.Byte,System.Byte)">
            <summary>Creates a color from RGB byte values (0-255) with full opacity.</summary>
            <param name="red">Red component (0-255).</param>
            <param name="green">Green component (0-255).</param>
            <param name="blue">Blue component (0-255).</param>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color.FromHex(System.String)">
            <summary>
            Parses an HTML/CSS-style hex colour string. Accepts:
            <c>"#RGB"</c>, <c>"#RGBA"</c>, <c>"#RRGGBB"</c>, <c>"#RRGGBBAA"</c>
            (the leading <c>#</c> is optional). Case-insensitive.
            </summary>
            <example><c>Colors.FromHex("#FF8800")</c>, <c>Colors.FromHex("F80")</c>.</example>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color.FromHsl(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)">
            <summary>Creates a color from HSL values where all components are in the range 0.0-1.0.</summary>
            <param name="hue">Hue component (0.0-1.0, maps to 0°-360°).</param>
            <param name="saturation">Saturation component (0.0-1.0).</param>
            <param name="lightness">Lightness component (0.0-1.0).</param>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color.FromHsl360(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)">
            <summary>Creates a color from HSL values where hue is 0-360 and saturation/lightness are 0.0-1.0.</summary>
            <param name="hue">Hue component in degrees (0-360).</param>
            <param name="saturation">Saturation component (0.0-1.0).</param>
            <param name="lightness">Lightness component (0.0-1.0).</param>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color.FromHsv(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)">
            <summary>Creates a color from HSV values where all components are in the range 0.0-1.0.</summary>
            <param name="hue">Hue component (0.0-1.0, maps to 0°-360°).</param>
            <param name="saturation">Saturation component (0.0-1.0).</param>
            <param name="value">Value/brightness component (0.0-1.0).</param>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color.FromHsv360(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)">
            <summary>Creates a color from HSV values where hue is 0-360 and saturation/value are 0.0-1.0.</summary>
            <param name="hue">Hue component in degrees (0-360).</param>
            <param name="saturation">Saturation component (0.0-1.0).</param>
            <param name="value">Value/brightness component (0.0-1.0).</param>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color.WithAlpha(System.Double)">
            <summary>Returns a new Color with the specified alpha value (0.0-1.0).</summary>
            <param name="alpha">The new alpha value (0.0 = transparent, 1.0 = opaque).</param>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color.WithAlphaByte(System.Byte)">
            <summary>Returns a new Color with the specified alpha byte value (0-255).</summary>
            <param name="alpha">The new alpha value (0 = transparent, 255 = opaque).</param>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color.Equals(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color)">
            <inheritdoc/>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color.Equals(System.Object)">
            <inheritdoc/>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color.GetHashCode">
            <inheritdoc/>
        </member>
        <member name="M:Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color.op_Equality(Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color,Pxl.Ui.CSharp.Color)">
            <summary>Determines whether two Color values are equal.</summary>
        </member>
